The '''Toscan 8-Q starfighter''' was the base model of the '''Toscan Multipurpose Fighter''' (or '''Toscan MPF'''), a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] manufactured by [[Shobquix Yards]] long before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it was almost obsolete.

==Characteristics==
The basic Toscan 8-Q was equipped only with a Class 2 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], low-powered [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]], basic [[Navigation computer/Legends|nav computer]], [[Life support/Legends|life support]] for a single [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], and a basic weapon package consisting of two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], leaving ample room for improvements. The [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]] design was produced by [[Koensayr Manufacturing/Legends|Koensayr Manufacturing]] and was ultimately used in Koensayr's own [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighter]].<ref name="TFUCG" />

==Role==
[[Shobquix Yards]] designed the Toscan 8-Q as an open-frame [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] for other [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] to modify in order to fill various starfighter roles, with both Shobquix and the entity that finished the Toscan profiting. The limited stock components and open frame provided extensive space for heavier weapon systems, maneuvering thrusters, additional crew or cargo capacity, or any other improvements desired by the finishing yard.<ref name="TFUCG" />

==History==
The Toscan Multipurpose Fighter was designed well before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]<ref name="TFUCG" /> and was one of Shobquix Yards' few production-model [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].<ref name="air" /> Expecting large sales volume to shipyards wanting to use their open-frame starfighter for their own projects, Shobquix produced the Toscan spaceframe in substantial numbers. However, Shobquix's idea was flawed; most shipyards preferred to design their starfighter frames from the ground up; and the final cost of a customized Toscan, with respect to the finished craft's capabilities, wound up being too high after both Shobquix and the customizing yard both took their due profits. The program wound up a horrible failure, with only few hundred Toscans being bought by various shipyards as test vehicles. The rest were sold at a markdown to private buyers, who typically lacked the resources of a full shipyard and therefore could rarely explore the full potential of the vessel, though they could frequently add cargo and passenger capacity.<ref name="TFUCG" />

One of the shipyards that did buy Toscans as a testing platform was [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]], who upgunned the starfighter into a [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] in order to test systems incorporated into the [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat|Skipray Blastboat]]. These Toscans were equipped with [[Quad laser cannon/Legends|quad laser cannons]] and dual [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]],<ref name="TFUCG" /> as well as a [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launcher with an 8-missile payload. These Sienar-modified Toscans were more resilient than the [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom]] [[T-65C-A2 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65C-A2 X-wing starfighter]], though slower, and had maneuverability that fell in between the X-wing and the less-maneuverable [[Slayn & Korpil/Legends|Slayn & Korpil]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighter]].<ref name="XWA" />

Although obsolete in times of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the Toscan 8-Q served as a capable member of many [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] forces and private defense [[Fleet/Legends|fleets]], especially in less-developed areas of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], particularly the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]], and the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. The [[m'Yalfor'ac Order]] made use of some customized Toscan 8-Q fighters, where the hyperdrive was removed to improve speed and firepower, as was reported by the [[Task Force on Alliance Security]] in [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]]<ref name="air" /> as well as in a follow-up report from [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Zgorth'sth]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Department of Threat Assessment]] following the final death of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].<ref name="SWAJ 15">{{JournalCite|15|Special Military Unit Intelligence Update}}</ref> They were in use in the region of the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]], and could be seen in the space around the [[refueling station]] [[Nwarcol Point]]. Around two dozen Toscan 8-Q fighters were employed by [[Kilon Tarlok]] to serve as the defense force of [[Terman Station]].<ref name="SSR">''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The ship was originally called the "'''Tocsan 8-Q starfighter'''" in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'',<ref name="air" /> but all but one subsequent source refer to the ship as "Toscan."<ref name="P&P">''[[Pirates & Privateers]]''</ref><ref name="SWAJ 15" /><ref name="XWA" /><ref name="Prima">[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref><ref name="TFUCG" /> The exception, ''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]'', instead refers to the vessel as the "'''Tocsan Q-8 starfighter'''."<ref name="SSR" />

A "Toscan Fighter" with a virtually identical external appearance appears in the computer game ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'', but it has significantly heavier weaponry consisting of [[Quad laser cannon/Legends|quad laser cannons]] and dual [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]] and is described as an "advanced space superiority fighter" produced by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]].<ref name="XWA" /> This inconsistency is explained in ''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]'' as Sienar using Shobquix-built frames to create a [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] model to test out several of the systems later used in the [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat|Skipray Blastboat]].<ref name="TFUCG" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
